# Suy Sideguy

> Runtime safety guard for autonomous AI agents. Watches process, file, and network behavior, applies policy rules, and terminates severe violations with SIGKILL. Stores evidence for incident-ready forensic reports. Python 3.9+, Apache 2.0.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/README.md): Install, quickstart, rollout strategy, safety caveats, log locations
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup, PR guidelines
- [Audit Checklist](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/docs/AUDIT_CHECKLIST.md): Promotion gate checks for deployment
- [Implementation Plan](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/docs/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN_LAYERED.md): Layered rollout roadmap

## Core Modules

- [Warden](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/suy_sideguy/warden.py): Main runtime loop — observe, evaluate, enforce
- [Observer](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/suy_sideguy/observer.py): Process/file/network monitoring via psutil
- [Policy](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/suy_sideguy/policy.py): Policy rule evaluation engine
- [Scope](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/suy_sideguy/scope.py): YAML scope file parser (allowlists, blocklists, thresholds)
- [Enforcement](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/suy_sideguy/enforcement.py): SIGKILL dispatch and enforcement actions
- [Forensic Report](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/suy_sideguy/forensic_report.py): Evidence aggregation and incident report export
- [Models](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/suy_sideguy/models.py): Shared data structures

## Examples

- [OpenClaw Scope](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/examples/scope.openclaw.yaml): Baseline policy for agent containment
- [Low-Disruption Scope](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/examples/scope.low-disruption.yaml): Conservative rollout profile

## Optional

- [Security Policy](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Vulnerability reporting
- [Publish Checklist](https://github.com/roli-lpci/suy-sideguy/blob/main/PUBLISH_CHECKLIST.md): Release process
